name: momentum
title: Momentum
description: Handle Momentum app from Raycast. Track your time spent on different apps, files and web domains grouped by projects. And track time spent manually.
author: miguel_garcia_gonzalez

commands.name: open-momentum
commands.title: Open Momentum
commands.subtitle: Open main Momentum window
commands.description: Open Momentum main window like the status item action

commands.name: list-projects
commands.title: List projects
commands.subtitle: Show all projects
commands.description: Show all user's projects in Momentum app

commands.name: open-settings
commands.title: Open Momentum Settings
commands.subtitle: Open the Raycast settings section
commands.description: Open Momentum settings focused on the Raycast section

commands.name: resolve-conflicts
commands.title: Resolve conflicts
commands.subtitle: Open conflict resolution if needed
commands.description: Open Momentum conflict resolution dialog when there are pending conflicts

commands.name: manual-start
commands.title: Start manual tracking
commands.subtitle: Use existing or new project
commands.description: Start manual tracking with an existing project or creating a new one

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
